verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet And a light unto my path. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I feel afraid, think I've lost my way Still you're there right beside me And nothing will I fear, as long as You are near Please be near me to the end

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet And a light unto my path. :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will not forget, Your love for me and yet My heart forever is wandering Jesus be my guide, and hold me to Your side I will love You to the end

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet And a light unto my path. :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Nothing will I fear, as long as You are near Please be near me to the end

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet And a light unto my path And a light unto my path You're the light unto my path
